focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus learns of radiation and hunter-killers from Kyle and Star, who reveal their names; Kyle invites Marcus to join them, and after hesitation, Marcus follows the teens toward distant buildings as a hunter-killer passes.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Survivor guiding and recruiting Marcus
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kyle explains the hunter-killer threat to Marcus and invites him to join their search for shelter.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Reach the buildings half a mile away for shelter with Star and Marcus
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kyle, Star, and Marcus are traveling together toward the buildings
evidence_quotes: KYLE (cont'd) Gonna be light soon, Marcus, better find cover. We spotted some buildings half a mile that way.
Kyle calls over his shoulder: KYLE (cont'd) You can come if you want.

relation_updates: Establishes cooperative relationship with Marcus
Expresses liking for Marcus
status_updates: Becomes guide and informant to Marcus
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resourceful group leader who takes initiative in dangerous situations

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus reveals he killed a cop who violently attacked his younger brother during a car theft, leading to his imprisonment; he now stays with Kyle and Star, finding a sense of purpose in protecting them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kyle invites Marcus to join their mission
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kyle asks Marcus to join them in finding the Resistance and fighting for John Connor, and Marcus agrees to stay.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find the Resistance and fight for John Connor
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marcus agrees to stay with Kyle and Star, indicating acceptance into their group.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether they will successfully find the Resistance
evidence_quotes: KYLE We're gonna find the Resistance, fight for John Connor against Skynet. You oughta join us, you're pretty cool.
KYLE You gonna be here when I wake up? MARCUS Sure.

relation_updates: Marcus accepted as ally and protector
Kyle shares mission and background with Marcus
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Kyle is committed to finding the Resistance and believes in John Connor.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The radio broadcasts instructions for explosives from John Connor, revealing a distant battle with machines; the group sees the destruction, then drives away, inspired by Connor's message of hope.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Driver of the jeep hearing John Connor's radio broadcast
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Recognizes John Connor's voice on the radio and is excited by the broadcast's instructions and message of hope.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Drives the jeep away from the distant destruction, continuing with the group after hearing Connor's message.
evidence_quotes: KYLE becomes visibly excited, recognizing the voice immediately—'That's him!'
The RADIO VOICE continues, urging listeners not to give in to despair: 'As bleak as things seem, I assure you, humanity will triumph.'
HIGH ANGLE shows THE JEEP turning away from the conflagration, moving off in a new direction and vanishing into the darkness.

relation_updates: Reinforces bond with John Connor through voice recognition
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resistance follower who identifies with John Connor's leadership

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus sneaks onto the transport, sees Kyle and Star imprisoned, stops the lid from sealing with his axe, and rides as it lifts into the air, undetected by the harvester.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Captured human prisoner of Skynet
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Captured by a Skynet Harvester, injected unconscious, and deposited in a transport container.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Unconscious and imprisoned in an airborne transport container.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Being transported to an unknown Skynet location while unconscious.
evidence_quotes: it carries KYLE and STAR, the kids struggle frantically, caught in the harvester's jointed steel appendages.
INJECTS the boy-- who instantly goes limp, unconscious.
the Harvester DEPOSITS the HUMAN CAPTIVES inside, and the LID SLAMS SHUT.
about TWENTY HUMAN PRISONERS, unconscious on the steel floor. Among them are KYLE and STAR.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Vulnerable captive

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: An engineer evaluates prisoners' neural data, marking barcodes red or green; Kyle's is approved, Star's rejected despite hesitation, and Star's cap is discarded as assessments continue.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Prisoner assessed in neural evaluation chamber
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Engineer approves Kyle's neural data, stating 'Looks good' and turning his barcode green.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Neural data approved with green barcode
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What processing entails for approved subjects
evidence_quotes: 'Looks good,' the engineer says
Kyle's barcode turns green.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Subject with approved neural data

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus removes his neural interface after a facility explosion, rejecting the AI network in anguish and determination, haunted by his friends' fate and the destroyed lives around him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Human brain processed into Skynet's neural network
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus sees Kyle Reese's image marked as PROCESSED on the computer terminal, confirming his integration.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Confirmed as processed and integrated into Skynet's neural network
evidence_quotes: KYLE'S IMAGE, the date 10.16.18... the time, 22:19:23. The word, in green: PROCESSED.

status_updates: Confirmed as PROCESSED in Skynet's neural network
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Processed human mind in Skynet's neural network

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus, now dressed in the Engineer's clothes, reunites with Kyle and Star as prisoners escape; the Engineer sits defeated, entranced by his interface, while Marcus leads the group to freedom.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Prisoner freed by Marcus
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Kyle is released from his containment chamber, reunites with Star, and follows Marcus as they start escaping the lab.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape the Skynet facility with Star
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Escaping the lab with Marcus and Star
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Alarm triggered, indicating potential pursuit
evidence_quotes: CLOSE as KYLE'S TRAY slides out of his CHAMBER. The RESTRAINTS retract automatically.
He climbs off his tray, takes her in his arms.
MARCUS approaches KYLE, buttoning his new shirt.
MARCUS We've gotta get out of here. He leads the kids out the way he came

relation_updates: Reunites with Marcus
Protective bond with Star confirmed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Protective companion focused on Star's safety

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: John Connor reveals himself to Kyle Reese, who is awestruck; Connor apologizes to Marcus, then directs his troops as the group stays together.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Kyle Reese meets John Connor at the dock
timeline_nodes.salient_development: A haz-mat figure approaches Kyle, asks his name, reveals himself as John Connor, and they shake hands; Kyle is amazed and speechless.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kyle stays with Marcus and Star under resistance protection at the dock
evidence_quotes: HAZ-MAT MAN What's your name, son?
KYLE Kyle Reese.
CONNOR John Connor. I'm glad you made it.
He shakes hands, wide-eyed and speechless.

relation_updates: Meets John Connor and shakes his hand
Remains grouped with Marcus and Star
status_updates: Now under protection of resistance forces
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Kyle Reese, identified by name to John Connor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus agrees to undergo facial reconstruction to become John Connor, preserving the symbolic leader's image after Connor's impending death, with Kate and Connor emphasizing the importance of the cause over the individual.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Young resistance member receiving a photo and information about his mother from John Connor
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns his mother's name is Sarah and is given her Polaroid photo by John Connor
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Kyle exits the medical area with Star, carrying the photo
evidence_quotes: CONNOR Her name was Sarah... she was... amazing...
CONNOR Keep it.
KYLE is a bit puzzled, but obediently keeps the snapshot.

relation_updates: Bond with John Connor strengthened through disclosure about mother and gift of photo
status_updates: Becomes holder of Sarah's Polaroid photo
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Young resistance member holding his mother's photo

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Kyle Reese, a teenage survivor, forms a group with Marcus Wright and Star, sharing knowledge of the apocalypse and seeking the Resistance. After being captured by Skynet and integrated into its neural network, he is freed by Marcus and eventually meets John Connor. He learns about his mother from Connor, solidifying his personal connection to the Resistance cause.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus Wright, a death-row inmate, signs over his body to Project Angel, run by terminally ill Dr. Serena Kogan, who believes his donation may help advance experimental medical research.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Death-row inmate signs body donation consent form to Project Angel.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus signs the Project Angel consent form after Dr. Kogan discloses her terminal cancer, leading to a brief exchange about their shared death sentences.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Body pledged to Project Angel; remains on death row awaiting execution.
evidence_quotes: SERENA Marcus-- I'm Doctor Serena Kogan, I'm with Project Angel. You consented to donate your body to science...
Marcus sits up, she passes him the clipboard and pen--
SERENA (NODS) You're not the only one with a death sentence.

relation_updates: Established connection with Dr. Serena Kogan
status_updates: Consented to donate body to Project Angel
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resigned and sarcastic inmate who acknowledges shared mortality.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus, remorseful, dies by lethal injection, hallucinating Serena's face before darkness; scene transitions to South-Central Sector, North America.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Executed inmate expresses remorse
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus is executed by lethal injection; he verbally expresses remorse and hallucinates Serena's face before dying.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dead
evidence_quotes: MARCUS (V.O.) What can I say. I was seventeen, I was angry, I was stupid.
MARCUS (V.O.) (cont'd) Yeah... I'm sorry about it. I'm sorry about everything. The whole goddamn world...
From the WHITE SCREEN, a FACE emerges, backlit, blurred-- it's SERENA.

relation_updates: Expressed remorse and thought of Serena in final moments

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus Wright emerges naked and disoriented from mud months after being submerged, screaming as rain washes dirt from his face, now revived in a desolate cornfield.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Revived Marcus Wright emerges from mud in a desolate cornfield.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus Wright, naked and mud-covered, rises from the ground, disoriented and screaming as rain washes his face.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Alive, disoriented, and standing in a rain-soaked, desolate cornfield with dead corn.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How and why Marcus was revived remains unexplained.
evidence_quotes: and FALLING RAIN washes away mud from his face... it's MARCUS WRIGHT.
He opens his mouth, makes a few GUTTURAL NOISES...
then SCREAMS.

status_updates: Naked and disoriented in a cornfield
auxiliary.persona_anchor: In shock and agony, evidenced by screaming and guttural noises.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus learns of radiation and hunter-killers from Kyle and Star, who reveal their names; Kyle invites Marcus to join them, and after hesitation, Marcus follows the teens toward distant buildings as a hunter-killer passes.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Initial human contact and tentative alliance formation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus flees from T-400 Terminators, confronts Kyle and Star in an armed standoff, de-escalates by disarming and negotiating, learns their names and that they are in Texas, and follows them toward shelter.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Reach shelter with Kyle and Star
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Following Kyle and Star toward buildings for shelter
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Safety from Terminators during the journey
evidence_quotes: These aren't humans. They're T- s-- PLASTIC-SKINNED TERMINATORS-- armed with PLASMA RIFLES.
THE BOY emerges from behind some RUBBLE, holding a HANDGUN in one hand, a lit OIL LANTERN in the other.
A GIRL, a couple of years younger than the BOY, training the shotgun at Marcus' head-- she looks ready to shoot.
Do it, Star. Put it down.

relation_updates: Initial hostile confrontation with Kyle and Star
Kyle reveals names and invites Marcus to join
Forms tentative alliance

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus reveals he killed a cop who violently attacked his younger brother during a car theft, leading to his imprisonment; he now stays with Kyle and Star, finding a sense of purpose in protecting them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Protector with a criminal past
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus tells Kyle he killed a cop and was imprisoned, then promises to stay with Kyle and Star.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has committed to staying with and protecting Kyle and Star.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Marcus will join the Resistance, as invited by Kyle.
evidence_quotes: MARCUS (a long beat) I killed a cop.
MARCUS Sure.
MARCUS studies them.

relation_updates: Marcus shares his past with Kyle
Kyle invites Marcus to join the Resistance
Marcus promises to stay
status_updates: Becomes aware of the Resistance and John Connor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Doctor Jane confirms Marcus is a terminator with indestructible skin; flashbacks reveal his artificial construction and Serena's concern over his unconscious state.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Unconscious man examined and identified as a terminator
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Doctor Jane's scalpel fails to cut Marcus's skin, revealing his terminator nature during examination.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Unconscious and confirmed to be a terminator by the outpost medical staff.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How the outpost will react to harboring a terminator.
evidence_quotes: She takes a scalpel, pulls it across the CHARRED, HEAT- DEFORMED SKIN. It doesn't even leave an incision.
JANE (cont'd) He's a terminator.

relation_updates: Outpost residents perceive Marcus as a terminator
status_updates: Identified as a terminator with indestructible skin, titanium microgears, polymer optics, and lead-shielded CPU

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Blair and Marcus reach the platform but are blocked by approaching soldiers; Blair uses an RPG to destroy a ventilation fan blocking their path, creating an escape route despite the danger.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fugitive choosing to save the children
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus frees his legs from chains and insists on crossing the river to save Kyle and Star, despite Blair's warnings about the danger.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Cross the river to save Kyle and Star
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Legs freed from chains, escape route created via destroyed ventilation fan, and committed to rescuing the children.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Escaping the outpost and surviving the river crossing to find Kyle and Star.
evidence_quotes: MARCUS slides the BOLTS out of his legs, freeing himself from the chains.
MARCUS I'm heading across the river.
MARCUS I'm not human, remember?
MARCUS It's the only thing I can think of that makes any sense...

relation_updates: Blair admires Marcus and assists his escape
status_updates: Creating escape route via ventilation fan
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Determined fugitive prioritizing saving the children, using his non-human nature to justify the risk.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jeremy, a hybrid human-machine, reveals to Marcus that their community uses emotional regulation to cope with loss, masking grief with artificially induced endorphins.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marcus learns he is a hybrid from Jeremy.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jeremy confirms Marcus is a hybrid and explains the community uses emotional regulation to cope with loss.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find his kids, now aware of his hybrid identity.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Appalled in the upscale community after learning about hybrid nature and emotional regulation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Uncertainty about how hybrid status affects his mission and identity.
evidence_quotes: JEREMY A hybrid. The same as you.
MARCUS A hybrid-- human and machine?
Marcus stares at this, appalled, then blinks and looks away.

relation_updates: Jeremy becomes a source of information about hybrid nature
status_updates: Learns about fuel cells and artificial food

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus removes his neural interface after a facility explosion, rejecting the AI network in anguish and determination, haunted by his friends' fate and the destroyed lives around him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Marcus learns Kyle is processed into Skynet's neural net and Star is terminated, then physically removes his own neural interface to reject the system.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus views Kyle's PROCESSED and Star's TERMINATED status on the computer terminal, leading him to rip out and destroy his neural interface module.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marcus's connection to Skynet is severed, and he exits the chamber with determination.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kyle remains part of Skynet's neural net, and Marcus must now act without neural control.
evidence_quotes: KYLE'S IMAGE, the date 10.16.18... the time, 22:19:23. The word, in green: PROCESSED.
Move to STAR'S IMAGE. 10.15.18... 22:20:49... and the word, in red: TERMINATED.
MARCUS is going through a terrible internal struggle, the interface fighting his own natural emotions.

relation_updates: Marcus's trust in Serena/Skynet is broken
status_updates: Marcus is no longer connected to Skynet's neural network
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Marcus experiences pain and internal struggle but acts with resolve after breaking from Skynet.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus agrees to undergo facial reconstruction to become John Connor, preserving the symbolic leader's image after Connor's impending death, with Kate and Connor emphasizing the importance of the cause over the individual.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Subject of facial reconstruction to assume John Connor's identity
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus agrees to undergo facial and bodily reconstruction to become John Connor, as shown in medical diagrams.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To preserve the idea of John Connor for the resistance after Connor's death
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Marcus accepts the proposal by taking Connor's hand, committing to the transformation
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The execution of the reconstruction and Marcus's future leadership
evidence_quotes: KATE (cont'd) Marcus... you're going to need to be rebuilt. Your face, your body, your voice...
CONNOR I never knew how I was supposed to win this war. But I finally understand: the idea of John Connor is more important than the person.
He lifts his hand-- the SKIN TATTERED, METAL exposed at finger joints-- and moves to take CONNOR'S TREMBLING HAND.

relation_updates: Trust bond with Connor and Kate solidified
status_updates: Will undergo facial reconstruction to assume John Connor's identity
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A hero who liberated a Skynet camp, trusted by Connor and Kate

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Marcus Wright, a death-row inmate, donates his body to Project Angel and is executed. He is revived years later in a post-apocalyptic world, where he forms bonds with survivors Kyle and Star and discovers his own hybrid nature. After rejecting Skynet's control and traveling through time, he ultimately assumes the identity of John Connor to lead the human resistance.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus learns of radiation and hunter-killers from Kyle and Star, who reveal their names; Kyle invites Marcus to join them, and after hesitation, Marcus follows the teens toward distant buildings as a hunter-killer passes.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: group member moving with Marcus and Kyle
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star learns about radiation and hunter-killers from the encounter but maintains distrust of Marcus and questions Kyle's decision to include him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: assess Marcus's threat to group safety
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: moving with Kyle and Marcus toward shelter
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Marcus should be trusted or is needed
evidence_quotes: STAR gives Marcus a small, reluctant wave.
STAR (hissing at him) Why? We don't need him.

relation_updates: maintains distrust of Marcus
defers to Kyle's leadership but voices disagreement
status_updates: gains knowledge of radiation and H-K threats
auxiliary.persona_anchor: defiant yet pragmatic survivor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus and Star bond over a phonebook; he sings 'Twinkle Twinkle,' triggering her emotional memory, and she asks him to stay, leading to a heartfelt embrace.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: young survivor forming emotional bond through shared memory
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star reacts emotionally to Marcus singing 'Twinkle Twinkle' and explicitly asks him to stay with them.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Star has asked Marcus to stay and they share a hug, showing a formed attachment.
evidence_quotes: STAR peers out-- and looks relieved to see Marcus is still with them.
MARCUS & STAR "How I wonder what you are... up above the world so high, like a diamond in the sky..."
STAR (cont'd) Stay with us, Marcus. Please.

relation_updates: Star asks Marcus to stay with her and Kyle
auxiliary.persona_anchor: shows attachment to Marcus and emotional vulnerability

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The radio broadcasts instructions for explosives from John Connor, revealing a distant battle with machines; the group sees the destruction, then drives away, inspired by Connor's message of hope.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: witness to distant machine attack and listener to John Connor's radio broadcast
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star points out distant flames and machines, and hears Connor's broadcast about explosives and hope.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: drives away with group in Jeep after observing destruction and hearing broadcast
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about acting on Connor's explosive instructions
evidence_quotes: STAR enjoying the breeze and the unfamiliar sensation of a moving vehicle.
STAR urges Kyle to go faster
STAR suddenly points toward the horizon.

relation_updates: shared experience with Marcus and Kyle observing war's devastation
status_updates: exposed to John Connor's resistance message
witnesses evidence of active machine warfare
auxiliary.persona_anchor: attentive to both the vehicle ride and the radio message

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus disarms and overpowers the cannibals, freeing Kyle and Star; he subdues Pig and Bull, who claim the bodies were already dead, then flees after hearing cries and a mechanical rumble outside.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: victim of cannibal trap
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star eats dried meat, Marcus tells her to spit it out, she sees a severed human hand and retches, is captured by a cannibal, and freed when Marcus overpowers the attackers.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: fleeing the service station with Kyle
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: mechanical rumble and cries outside suggest new threat
evidence_quotes: STAR (CHEWING) It's good!
Star sees it too, turns and RETCHES, just as--
COW grabs STAR, shoves her into the center of the garage, beside Kyle and Bull.

relation_updates: rescued by Marcus from cannibal capture
flees to safety with Kyle
status_updates: aware of human threats beyond machines
auxiliary.persona_anchor: traumatized after discovering she ate human flesh

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus sneaks onto the transport, sees Kyle and Star imprisoned, stops the lid from sealing with his axe, and rides as it lifts into the air, undetected by the harvester.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: unconscious captive in transport container
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Injected unconscious by Harvester, deposited in transport container, and briefly opens eyes to see Marcus's silhouette before losing consciousness again.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: unconscious in transport container as it lifts off with other prisoners
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: fate as prisoner in airborne transport
evidence_quotes: It does the same to STAR.
Star MOANS, opens her eyes briefly and sees-- --MARCUS' SILHOUETTE above her.

relation_updates: briefly sees Marcus's silhouette above her, indicating his rescue attempt
auxiliary.persona_anchor: vulnerable to machine capture and injection

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Aerostats with pincers process prisoners, causing pain; a woman comforts Kyle, who now bears a fresh bar code on his arm, as they fear their fate.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: processed prisoner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star is branded with a barcode by a processing aerostat, causing pain; she moves to Kyle for comfort and asks about their fate.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Injured with a burned wrist and marked with a barcode, in transport with Kyle.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What will happen to them after processing.
evidence_quotes: STAR gets the same treatment from a different AEROSTAT.
tears in her eyes, sucking on her burned wrist to ease the pain.
STAR What's going to happen to us?

relation_updates: moves to Kyle's side for comfort after processing
status_updates: branded with barcode by processing aerostat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Physically marked by Skynet's aerostat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Kyle and Star, holding hands, are slid into panel-covered chambers in a sterile facility as screams echo; they sing until separated, while robotic lasers operate on patients nearby.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Captive restrained on a sliding tray, separated from Kyle during entry into testing chamber.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star is clamped onto a tray, holds hands with Kyle across a gap, expresses distress, and is slid into a chamber, separating from him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Isolated inside a testing chamber with panels shut.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What the testing involves and whether she will be reunited with Kyle.
evidence_quotes: their heads, feet and chests are clamped onto SLIDING TRAYS
Kyle and Star must reach across a gap between the trays to hold hands.
STAR Oh no, oh no...
the trays slowly SLIDE into the OPENINGS

relation_updates: physically separated from Kyle after holding hands
status_updates: clamped onto sliding trays and moved into testing chambers
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Fearful but maintains singing with Kyle until separation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: An engineer evaluates prisoners' neural data, marking barcodes red or green; Kyle's is approved, Star's rejected despite hesitation, and Star's cap is discarded as assessments continue.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: prisoner evaluated for neural processing
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star is assessed as borderline and emotionally incompatible, her barcode turns red, and her baseball cap is discarded.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: rejected for neural processing
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: what will happen to Star after rejection
evidence_quotes: he hesitates, stroking his chin. 'Hm, borderline. May not be emotionally compatible. Pass.'

auxiliary.persona_anchor: emotionally incompatible with machine use

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Marcus, now dressed in the Engineer's clothes, reunites with Kyle and Star as prisoners escape; the Engineer sits defeated, entranced by his interface, while Marcus leads the group to freedom.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: rescued prisoner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Marcus frees Star from her containment chamber; she awakens and is given her baseball cap by him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the facility with Marcus and Kyle
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: free and with Marcus and Kyle, beginning to escape
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: successfully escaping the facility
evidence_quotes: She starts awake. STAR What?
Marcus hands Star her BASEBALL CAP, rescued from the trash.
As she puts it on: STAR I knew you'd come.

relation_updates: reunited with Marcus and Kyle
trust in Marcus affirmed ('I knew you'd come')
auxiliary.persona_anchor: trusts Marcus ('I knew you'd come')

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A missile destroys the boat as tanks and Terminators advance; Star embraces Marcus, while Kyle spots a distant shape. A-10s arrive, attacking the machines, one wags its wings, offering hope.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Defender who destroys a Terminator and accepts Marcus after initial rejection
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star destroys a Terminator with a plasma weapon, initially points a rifle at Marcus upon seeing his cyborg parts, but later puts the weapon aside and hugs him
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Star has accepted Marcus by hugging him, and the group is together as A-10s attack the machines
evidence_quotes: STAR snatches up their own PLASMA WEAPON, and BLASTS the thing in the back, knocking it INTO THE WATER,
As it rises, SHE FIRES again, taking the Terminator's head off. It goes under.
STAR raises the rifle, points it at him.
Star puts the rifle aside, with an apologetic expression. She moves to Marcus, gingerly touches his exposed metal-- then hugs him tightly.

relation_updates: Star destroys a Terminator
initially rejects Marcus after seeing his cyborg nature
accepts Marcus and hugs him
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Fierce protector who destroys Terminators and accepts Marcus despite his cyborg nature

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Star begins as Kyle's protective companion, initially distrustful of Marcus but gradually bonds with him through shared survival experiences. After capture and processing by Skynet, she is marked, rejected for neural use, and nearly terminated, but is rescued by Marcus. Ultimately, she accepts Marcus's cyborg nature and embraces him, solidifying their familial bond against the machine threat.
